rows.label: tlk70000033_04_msg0002
rows.name:
On behalf of the Pignerator
Trade Guild chairman, Momimi
offers big congratulations, mo!

rows.label: tlk70000033_04_msg0003
rows.name:
Why not celebrate lucky occasion with
lucky vase! Vase have grand history
and magic power to bring happiness.

rows.label: tlk70000033_04_msg0004
rows.name:
Mo? Too suspicious, no?
Momo~ friends not honest,
mo! Momimi know better, mo!

rows.label: tlk70000033_04_msg0005
rows.name:
But claims are totally factual.
Ancients used to wisely say "When
sad, check you have enough vases."

rows.label: tlk70000033_04_msg0006
rows.name:
Vase also said to boost martial
ability and appeal to opposite sex.
So really many benefits to be had.

rows.label: tlk70000033_04_msg0007
rows.name:
Mo! Don't look at Momimi with such
judging eyes! Momimi only want to
give congratulations. And sell vase.
